critical_issues.title: Coverage gate did not measure blob writer module
critical_issues.action: Updated coverage target from --cov=blob_writer to --cov=src.blob_writer so CI enforces blob writer coverage for the actual imported module.

critical_issues.title: Missing failed-blob-write failure-path unit test
critical_issues.action: Added a unit test that forces BlobWriter.write_failed to raise and asserts the failure is surfaced.

suggestions.title: Add explicit 28-player boundary validator assertion
suggestions.action: Added test_validator_accepts_count_at_upper_boundary for explicit coverage of the 28-player boundary.

suggestions.title: Demonstrate practical unit/integration marker separation
suggestions.action: Added explicit unit marker definition and applied pytest.mark.unit to test modules; no integration test was added because this QA issue scope is unit-test coverage with fully mocked dependencies.
